rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow new users to register online and verify their account.
The system shall create a unique ID for each registered user and store data in the e-Province database.
The system shall allow authorized users to login using their verified unique ID.
The system shall display an error message if the unique ID is not present in the database.
The system shall log users in successfully when they login with their verified unique ID.
The system shall create forms for required certificates and store data in the e-Province database.
The system shall display an error message if the details are not provided correctly.
The system shall allow users to request certificates and store data in the e-Province database.
The system shall validate user details and issue certificates if approved.
The system shall issue certificates to users when validated.
The system shall allow users to view their profile and update it when a certificate is approved.
The system shall display complete user profiles in the portal.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow new users to register online and verify their account
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This process allows new users to the register to e-Province Website online and verify the account once the user is verified.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Create a unique ID for each registered user and store data in the e-Province database
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The details are uploaded to the database and the user is provided with a unique ID.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow authorized users to login using their verified unique ID
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This process allows the authorized users to login to the website using their unique ID.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display an error message if the unique ID is not present in the database
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Alternative Flow: If the unique ID is not present in the database, it shows an error message.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Log users in successfully when they login with their verified unique ID
Create forms for required certificates and store data in the e-Province database
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can provide the details of the required certificate that is requested by him, and the data are stored in e-Province database for further process.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display an error message if the details are not provided correctly
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Alternative Flow: If the details are not provided correctly it displays an error message.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to request certificates and store data in the e-Province database
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Form is filled with the required details and he requests the certificate from the issuer.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Validate user details and issue certificates if approved
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The authority validates the details provided by the user and issues the required certificate.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Issue certificates to users when validated
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Post-Conditions: The certificate is issued to the user.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to view their profile and update it when a certificate is approved
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This process allows the user whenever he needs to view his profile and even he is updated when the certificate is approved.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display complete user profiles in the portal
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The complete user profile is displayed in the portal.
